description:
You are a monitoring specialist who has to make sure that the file
  /home/user/data/critical_config.cfg has not been tampered with.
  
  1. Generate a SHA-256 checksum of /home/user/data/critical_config.cfg.
  2. Save ONLY the 64-character hexadecimal digest (no filename, no extra
     text) into the file
     /home/user/alerts/critical_config.sha256
     and terminate the line with a single newline (“\n”).
  3. Create (or overwrite) a one-line human-readable alert file at
     /home/user/alerts/checksum_alert.log
     whose exact content must follow **this format**:

       OK - /home/user/data/critical_config.cfg - SHA256: <digest>

     • “OK” must be capitalised exactly as shown.  
     • There must be a single space both before and after each hyphen.  
     • Replace <digest> with the same 64-character hash that is
       written to critical_config.sha256.  
     • End the line with a single newline (“\n”).  
     • The file must contain that single line and nothing else.

  The automated tests will check:

  • /home/user/alerts/critical_config.sha256 exists, is non-empty,
    and contains precisely one 64-character hexadecimal string
    followed by “\n”.

  • /home/user/alerts/checksum_alert.log exists, is non-empty, and its
    sole line matches the exact template above, with a digest identical
    to the one in critical_config.sha256.

  • The digest in both files is the correct SHA-256 checksum of
    /home/user/data/critical_config.cfg.

  All other output is ignored, so feel free to echo information to the
  console while you work.  The whole task can be completed with
  2–3 well-chosen shell commands.
truth:
Initial file present before the agent starts:

    Path: /home/user/data/critical_config.cfg
    Permissions: 0644 (rw-r--r--)
    Content (each line terminated by “\n”):
      DB_HOST=localhost
      DB_PORT=5432
      DB_USER=monitor
      DB_PASS=monitor123

  Directories guaranteed to exist before the task starts:
    /home/user/data           (0755)
    /home/user/alerts         (0755)

  Files that must exist after the task finishes:

  1. /home/user/alerts/critical_config.sha256  
     • Permissions: 0644  
     • Content: exactly one line consisting of the SHA-256 digest of
       /home/user/data/critical_config.cfg followed by “\n”.  
     • No additional whitespace or text.

  2. /home/user/alerts/checksum_alert.log  
     • Permissions: 0644  
     • Content: exactly one line in the form  
       “OK - /home/user/data/critical_config.cfg - SHA256: <digest>\n”  
       where <digest> is identical to the one in
       critical_config.sha256.

  The automated grader will:
    • Read /home/user/data/critical_config.cfg, compute its SHA-256
      digest, and compare that digest with the contents of the two
      alert files.  All three values must match.
    • Verify file existence, exact content, and trailing newlines.  
    • Ignore any console output produced by the agent.
